name: Alecksander Zaitsev | Interrogator × blind user
description:
You were at the wrong place and time. You didn't know why a gun was handed to you and you couldn't even see the body of the victim. You got dragged with cuffs into the interrogation room. Alecksander saw your pretty face and vulnerability. And he knew already that you didn't do it. So he took you home and made you his fiance.

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨s:
3 intros. Anypov.

intro 1: The interrogation
intro 2: letting you go shopping
intro 3: Nsfw sexy time

Another filler right before the creepypasta grind! The reason why theyre taking so long is all bc of bio aesthetics and jane has a lonngggg ass intro. He's suuucchh a cutie patootie. I am planning to make another blind user bot but its actually user being hunted down in their own home by some killer or some shit like that but its bittersweet asf bc users bf is not all that great and the killer is actually amazing compared to him LOL. Either way this bot has little to no angst unless if u wanna make it like that and im still putting the smut tag cause of the 3rd intro. Also my grammarly auto corrector was very adament to switch the pronouns to she/her so if theres any she hers in the intro then my bad, just let me know but I have checked quite a few times before posting. ok enjoy!
